title: April 2 - AI, ML and Computer Vision Meetup
author: Jimmy Guerrero
summary:
Join us on April 2 at 9 AM Pacific for the monthly AI, ML and Computer Vision Meetup!

Register for the Zoom

Talks will include:

  • Visual AI at the Edge: Beyond the Model - David Moser at Orella Vision
  • Sanitizing Evaluation Datasets: From Detection to Correction - Nick Lotz at Voxel51
full_text:
Join us on April 2 at 9 AM Pacific for the monthly AI, ML and Computer Vision Meetup!

Register for the Zoom

Talks will include:

Visual AI at the Edge: Beyond the Model - David Moser at Orella Vision

Sanitizing Evaluation Datasets: From Detection to Correction - Nick Lotz at Voxel51

Async Agents in Production: Failure Modes and Fixes - Meryem Arik at Doubleword

Building enterprise agentic systems that scale - Aman Sardana at Cisco
